response.overview: A young couple’s dream of a new beginning turns into a living nightmare when they lease a fully furnished apartment in Malé, unknowingly unlocking a dark, haunted history. As financial stress and family tensions strain their relationship, a violent, malevolent entity begins possessing the wife—forcing her husband into a desperate race against time to uncover the truth behind a tragic past before the spirit destroys them both.
response.title: BIBBI
